title: Ban Bueng Phra Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Ban Bueng Phra, with a Z-Score of +3.03. The heat wave has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Ban Bueng Phra is causing extremely hot temperatures, with a CDD of 9.6 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 85%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed is at 4.7 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
